name: Implement ParsePubKey for compressed pubkey
research: utils/utils.go:ParsePubKey - current implementation only handles npub bech32 and 64-char hex. Compressed pubkey (66 chars, starts with 02 or 03) comes from NIP-19 encodePack output.
change: Add case for 66-char hex string starting with 02 or 03. Extract x coordinate from compressed format and verify it's on secp256k1 curve.
